variables.notes: Used the dedicated above-EBIT R&D line first, with 'R & D Expenses' as fallback for possible label changes across years. The same primary R&D row is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS so XSGA - XRD works as intended.

Explicit recurring lease-interest expense.
Explicit recurring lease-interest expense for some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-interest information; not needed if the main lease-interest rows are used.

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring interest rows over 'Financial expenses' because the total finance-cost line appears to include non-interest valuation/fair-value items in some years. Chosen rows may not capture all borrowing interest in every year, but they are the cleanest recurring interest candidates available from the provided list.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet equity line available from candidates.

variables.notes: No clearer parent-only balance-sheet equity line is available in the preview. Used total shareholders equity as BE; accordingly MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.

variables.notes: Set to empty because BE uses 'Total shareholders equity'; leaving MIB blank avoids double counting under the BE + MIB rule. The available NCI/minority-interest rows also appear to be zero/blank.
